name: NAVITIME API

seo.meta_description: NAVITIME API: Japans leading routing provider — door-to-door multimodal APIs covering trains, buses, walking and driving.

when_to_use: Door-to-door multimodal routing covering trains, buses, walking
Japanese public transit APIs for travel and navigation apps
Real-time transit delay and route alternative lookups in Japan
Building navigation apps for Japanese tourist and commuter use
Transit time matrix API for logistics scheduling in Japan

pros: Accurate train schedules and platform-level detail
Trusted by major JP travel apps
review.verdict: The routing standard in Japan; no global alternative matches its JP transit accuracy.
review.best_for: Travel, logistics, and commuter apps serving Japan
review.not_for: Global apps needing broad multi-country coverage
